data.name: Femboy & Futa Cozy Cafe
data.detailed_description:
烘焙咖啡豆的香氣、義式咖啡機的嘶嘶聲，還有一張銀行的催債通知單……

經歷一連串事件後，你繼承了童年時光流連的鬍鬚咖啡館（Whiskers Coffeehouse）。但溫馨的懷舊之情很快就被冰冷的現實打破：一家大型連鎖企業想要這塊地，而銀行也威脅要取消抵押品贖回權。

困在毫無前途且令人厭倦的企業工作中，你決定放手一搏。你辭掉工作，搬進樓上滿是灰塵的房間，決心讓咖啡館重獲新生。但你無法獨自完成。

你需要一個團隊。一個獨特、充滿熱情，或許……願意將工作與極大的享樂結合在一起的團隊。

歡迎來到你身為鬍鬚咖啡館老闆的新生活！

💕 連結與戀愛

你的員工都住在二樓。白天一起工作，晚上則在休息室閒聊或拜訪他們的房間。

  • 深厚羈絆： 每個角色都有豐富的背景故事、不安全感和夢想。幫助他們克服掙扎，解鎖他們真實的自我。

  • 親密關係： 建立信任會引發激情。體驗全動態、無修正的場景，作為你對伴侶全心付出的回報。

  • 溫馨氛圍： 不僅僅是火熱的激情；還有摸頭殺、擁抱和如家人般的歸屬感。

認識成員

Noelle - 甜美笨拙的烘焙師

(偽娘)
頂著淡粉色的頭髮並擁有一顆金子般的心，Noelle 烘焙出的糕點美味如天堂——只要他別被自己的腳絆倒。他一直難以找到一個能接納他可愛風格的地方，但也許在這裡，他終於能綻放光芒。

  • 職位： 糕點師兼服務生

  • 喜好： 甜食、寬鬆毛衣、被誇獎。

Ash - 完美主義咖啡師

(扶他)
冷酷、優雅且令人生畏。Ash 將沖煮咖啡視為一門科學，容不下任何瑕疵。她離開了充滿銅臭味的連鎖咖啡界，只為尋找一個有靈魂的地方。你能融化她冰冷的外表並贏得她的尊重嗎？

  • 職位： 咖啡師

  • 喜好： 古董磨豆機、深焙咖啡、安靜。

Ellis - 網路紅人

(偽娘)
活力、魅力，以及隨時準備好的環形燈。Ellis 是一名試圖大紅大紫的主播，利用他充滿磁性的個性來吸引顧客。他輕浮且自信，但這一切是否只是為了鏡頭所做的表演？

  • 職位： 服務生兼社群經理

  • 喜好： 趨勢話題、遊戲、成為眾人焦點。

Jamie - 廚房的核心

(扶他)
溫暖、能幹且無比可靠。Jamie 是團隊中的「媽媽」，總是確保每個人都吃飽喝足且開心。但即使是最堅強的照顧者，有時也需要有人來照顧她。

  • 職位： 主廚

  • 喜好： 療癒美食、下雨天、被需要的感覺。

主要特色

  • 舒適的經營模擬： 進貨、烹飪、上菜和升級咖啡館的滿足循環。

  • 4 條獨特的戀愛路線： 在故事過程中追求 Noelle、Ash、Ellis 或 Jamie。

  • 日夜循環： 平衡你的工作職責與社交生活。

  • 成人內容： 透過遊戲解鎖高品質、兩情相悅的色情事件。享受詳細的插圖畫廊以及以流暢 2D 動畫呈現的特別親密場景。

  • 一隻暴躁的貓： 鬍鬚先生（Mr. Whiskers）是這棟房子的附屬品。盡量別惹惱牠。

拯救咖啡館。建立家庭。尋找真愛。

data.short_description: 繼承一家深受喜愛但負債累累的咖啡店，將其打造成城裡最熱門的避風港！僱用一群可愛的偽娘和迷人的扶他，掌握咖啡與美食的藝術，並建立深厚親密的連結。你能否在尋找真愛的同時，挽救祖父母留下的遺產？
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文, 菲律賓語, 印地語

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 或更高版本。
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64 位元 Intel 相容處理器
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 或 DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64 位元 Intel 相容處理器 (透過 Rosetta 2 支援 Apple Silicon)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64 位元 Intel 相容處理器
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Femboy & Futa Cozy Cafe
data.detailed_description:
The aroma of roasted beans, the hiss of the espresso machine, and a debt notice from the bank...

After a series of events, you inherit Whiskers Coffeehouse, the place where you spent your childhood. But the warm nostalgia is quickly shattered by a cold reality: a massive corporate chain wants the land, and the bank is threatening foreclosure.

Stuck in a dead-end unfulfilling corporate job, you decide to take a leap of faith. You quit your job, move into the dusty room upstairs, and decide to bring the café back to life. But you can’t do it alone.

You need a team. A team that is unique, passionate, and perhaps... willing to mix a little business with a whole lot of pleasure.

Welcome to your new life as the Boss of Whiskers Coffeehouse!

💕 Connect & Romance

Your staff all live together on the second floor. Work together during the day, and hang out in the lounge or visit their rooms at night.

  • Deep Bonds: Every character has a rich backstory, insecurities, and dreams. Help them overcome their struggles to unlock their true selves.

  • Intimacy: Building trust leads to passion. Experience fully animated, uncensored scenes that reward your dedication to your partners.

  • Wholesome Vibes: It’s not just about the heat; it’s about headpats, cuddles, and found family.

Meet the Crew

Noelle - The Sweet & Clumsy Baker

(Femboy)
With pastel pink hair and a heart of gold, Noelle bakes pastries that taste like heaven—when he isn't tripping over his own feet. He’s struggled to find a place that accepts his cute style, but maybe here, he can finally blossom.

  • Role: Pastry Chef & Waiter

  • Likes: Sweet things, oversized sweaters, praise.

Ash - The Perfectionist Barista

(Futanari)
Cool, elegant, and intimidating. Ash treats coffee brewing like a science and tolerates nothing less than perfection. She left the corporate coffee world to find a place with soul. Can you melt her icy exterior and earn her respect?

  • Role: Barista

  • Likes: Antique grinders, dark roast, silence.

Ellis - The Viral Sensation

(Femboy)
Energy, charm, and a ring light always at the ready. Ellis is a streamer trying to make it big, using his magnetic personality to draw in customers. He’s flirty and confident, but is it all just a performance for the camera?

  • Role: Server & Social Media Manager

  • Likes: Trending topics, gaming, being the center of attention.

Jamie - The Heart of the Kitchen

(Futanari)
Warm, capable, and undeniably reliable. Jamie is the "mom" of the group, always making sure everyone is fed and happy. But even the strongest caretakers need someone to take care of them sometimes.

  • Role: Chef

  • Likes: Comfort food, rainy days, feeling needed.

Key Features

  • Cozy Management Sim: A satisfying loop of stocking, cooking, serving, and upgrading your café.

  • 4 Unique Romance Routes: Pursue Noelle, Ash, Ellis, or Jamie over the course of the story.

  • Day/Night Cycle: Balance your work responsibilities with your social life.

  • Explicit Content: High-quality, consensual NSFW events unlocked through gameplay. Enjoy a gallery of detailed illustrations and special intimate scenes brought to life with smooth 2D animation.

  • A Grumpy Cat: Mr. Whiskers comes with the building. Try not to annoy him.

Save the café. Build a family. Find love.

data.short_description: Inherit a beloved but debt-ridden coffee shop and turn it into the city's hottest haven! Hire a cast of adorable femboys and stunning futanari, master the art of coffee and cuisine, and build deep, intimate connections. Can you save your grandparents' legacy while finding love?
data.supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Indonesian, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese, Filipino, Hindi

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 or higher.
  • Processor: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space

mac_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: 10.10+
  • Processor: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space

linux_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Ubuntu 20.04+
  • Processor: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 3.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
